---
name: New agent request
about: Request a new specialist agent and suggest division placement
title: "[NEW AGENT] Short agent name"
labels: new-agent
assignees: ''
---

**Agent name (proposed)**
Provide a kebab-case identifier and a human-friendly display name.

**Division**
Which division should this agent belong to? (career, company-interviews, engineering, interview, networking, projects, resume, startup)

**One-sentence description**
What does this agent do and who is it for?

**Why this belongs in the repo**
Explain the gap this agent fills and why it should be added.

**Suggested deliverables**
Checklist of concrete outputs the agent should produce (e.g. audit report, checklist, roadmap).

**Optional: example prompts or inputs**
Provide a short example of inputs a user would give the agent.
